green_gate_policy: Green allowed only with disclosure + financial actual + research/consensus-revision cross evidence.
Green allowed with government customer, delivery visibility, and margin/revision evidence.
Green allowed selectively; low-margin backlog and cancellation risk must be cleared.
Contract quality is not required; recurring export demand and EPS/OP revision are required.
Green allowed through export/channel/recurring-demand evidence, not contract quality.
Green allowed with memory-specific revision, pricing, supply discipline, and capacity evidence.
Green allowed with confirmed order-to-revenue conversion and customer capex durability.
Green allowed with export channel plus repeat consumable/service revenue.
Green allowed with ROE/PBR and durable capital return, not low PBR alone.
Green allowed only when cost improvement is recurring and paired with growth/FCF.
Green restricted by cycle cap unless structural cost-curve or supply discipline is explicit.
Green very restricted; normally cyclical success or Yellow/Red rather than structural Green.
Green highly restricted; overheat and CAPA overbuild penalties dominate unless contract economics are clear.
Green allowed with durable mix/FCF/return evidence; component cost pass-through must be proven.
Green very restricted; credit and cash-flow evidence must dominate order headline.
Green restricted unless tariff pass-through regime changes, not just one-time relief.
Green blocked before real revenue/royalty and dilution control.
Green restricted until revenue conversion and repeatability are proven.
Green allowed only with monetization and margin leverage, not MAU alone.
Green restricted unless IP repeatability and monetization are visible.
Green allowed only if governance action is backed by FCF/NAV improvement.
Green blocked by default; normally Stage 3-Red/Yellow guardrail.
Green blocked unless real EPS/FCF evidence overwhelms overheat risk.
Green restricted unless OP/FCF improvement is structural, not traffic-only.
Green blocked until a real archetype and evidence family are assigned.
